subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we’d love to explore this with you.

I’m pleased to propose the following slots for an introductory call, all in the 14:00–16:00 window:

- Tuesday, April 21
- Wednesday, April 22
- Thursday, April 23

Please let me know which day works best on your end, and I’ll get a calendar invite sent over.

Regarding the internal contact directory and direct phone lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I’m not able to share that information externally. I’d suggest visiting our public website at https://www.company.com/contact if you’d like to reach the right people directly.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
